summary: This is an extremely brief link post where Joel Spolsky directs readers to a Slashdot discussion about an interview with him by Rich Chapman. He also links to his own reply in the Slashdot comments. The post contains no substantive argument or analysis, serving purely as a pointer to external discussion.
key_points: Joel links to a Slashdot discussion of an interview conducted by Rich Chapman
He provides a direct link to his own reply in the comment thread
key_insight: This is a minimal link post with no substantive content to analyze.
